content:
since 2018, i've been backed up and focused on all the wrong elements of life, i barely generated any work, and sought acceptance and love from others to generate my own self acceptance and love, my lovers and friends didn't even know what i studied in school or that i was a writer or artist

this return and death (i survived a four story jump, liam payne died the same year from a three story jump) is a rebirth, fed up with the process of asking permission and approval to be me (job applications, publication of work ) i went into my own archive, and decided to ingest, digest, sort and order my own history and mythos,

i created a music playlist of my greatest loves,

i want to create an album that is samples/interpolations & remixes & covers of the music that makes up my dna,

sampling and wearing the ornaments of the past has always been a prime directive (Marilyn Manson found fame from Sweet Dreams; Kanye's use of social fabric music on College Dropout, but also on all records the messy mashups;);

a remix is also my most listened to song (MM song Third Day of a Seven Day Binge [my tattoos also are remixes of Manson's {and Radiohead (etcetera specifically referenced by multiple artists i love)}]) and is how i started my visual exploration of cubism and sampling in visuals; circa 2013;
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/13)
